name_en: Model 7737 The King of Commute~ Tote Monogram, full of high-end feel and high usage rate. The bag body is semi-rigid, very light, and comes with a long shoulder strap for easy carrying. It is versatile and great for styling!! Totes have always been leaders in capacity~
name_cn:

Model: 7737
Dimensions L18 W8 H18
